rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.408, which concerns educators' rights to join professional associations. No conflict exists.
quote: This chapter does not abridge the right of an educator to join any professional association or organization or refuse to join any professional association or organization.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
